snippet: The department recommends that schools review their local policy on students using mobile phones every 3 to 4 years or earlier where required, for example if: A policy review should focus on the effectiveness of the school’s policy in meeting the objectives of this policy, which aims to help focus students’ attention on learning in the classroom by providing them with: Schools are encouraged to collect data as part of their review to help to measure their success in achieving these objectives. Examples of data that you may choose to collect include: For sample survey or focus group questions refer to: Mobile phone policy review survey questions (DOCX) External Link (staff login required).
